args: const { normalizeBook } = require('./apps/catalog/model.cjs'); const b = normalizeBook({ title: ' Dune ', author: ' Frank Herbert ' }); if (b.title !== 'Dune' || b.author !== 'Frank Herbert') throw new Error(JSON.stringify(b)); try { normalizeBook({ title: '', author: 'x' }); throw new Error('expected TypeError'); } catch (error) { if (!(error instanceof TypeError)) throw error; } console.log('catalog model ok');

workItems.title: Implement create-book API handler against OpenAPI contract

args: const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); const { handleCreateBook } = require('./apps/catalog/api.cjs'); const created = handleCreateBook({ method: 'POST', body: { title: ' Dune ', author: ' Frank Herbert ' } }); if (created.status !== 201 || created.body.book.title !== 'Dune' || created.body.book.author !== 'Frank Herbert') throw new Error(JSON.stringify(created)); const invalid = handleCreateBook({ method: 'POST', body: { title: '', author: 'x' } }); if (invalid.status !== 400 || !invalid.body.error) throw new Error(JSON.stringify(invalid)); const evidencePath = path.join(process.env.MAKEITREAL_BOARD_DIR, 'evidence', 'work.catalog-api.openapi-conformance.json'); fs.writeFileSync(evidencePath, JSON.stringify({ kind: 'openapi-conformance', ok: true, workItemId: process.env.MAKEITREAL_WORK_ITEM_ID, contractId: 'contract.catalog.create.openapi', cases: [{ contractId: 'contract.catalog.create.openapi', request: { method: 'POST', path: '/books', body: { title: ' Dune ', author: ' Frank Herbert ' } }, response: created }, { contractId: 'contract.catalog.create.openapi', request: { method: 'POST', path: '/books', body: { title: '', author: 'x' } }, response: invalid }] }, null, 2)); console.log('catalog api ok');

{"type":"result","subtype":"success","is_error":false,"api_error_status":null,"duration_ms":53332,"duration_api_ms":51715,"num_turns":12,"result":"파일이 정상적으로 작성되었습니다. `apps/catalog/api.cjs`에 `handleCreateBook` 핸들러를 구현했습니다.

구현 내용:
- `normalizeBook(request.body)` 호출 (contract.catalog.model 사용)
- 성공 시 `{ status: 201, body: { book } }` 반환 (contract.catalog.create.openapi의 201 스키마 일치)
- model이 던진 `TypeError`만 잡아 `{ status: 400, body: { error } }` 반환 (AC-004의 선언된 invalid body 매핑)
- 그 외 예외는 다시 throw — 선언되지 않은 fallback 동작 추가하지 않음

`allowedPaths`인 `apps/catalog/api.cjs`만 수정했고, 선언된 `contract.catalog.model`만 의존성으로 사용했습니다. 검증 증거 생성은 Make It Real 엔진에 맡깁니다.","stop_reason":"end_turn","session_id":"dac538f6-1131-4675-b839-2c73c7ea9a29","total_cost_usd":0.459178,"usage":{"input_tokens":41,"cache_creation_input_tokens":34940,"cache_read_input_tokens":322296,"output_tokens":3178,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":34940,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[{"input_tokens":6,"output_tokens":342,"cache_read_input_tokens":53947,"cache_creation_input_tokens":514,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":514},"type":"message"}],"speed":"standard"},"modelUsage":{"claude-opus-4-7[1m]":{"inputTokens":41,"outputTokens":3178,"cacheReadInputTokens":322296,"cacheCreationInputTokens":34940,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":0.459178,"contextWindow":1000000,"maxOutputTokens":64000}},"permission_denials":[{"tool_name":"Bash","tool_use_id":"toolu_01K82qpPsB6J6pxozDN6Ysns","tool_input":{"command":"ls -la apps/catalog/ && node -e "const { handleCreateBook } = require('./apps/catalog/api.cjs'); const created = handleCreateBook({ method: 'POST', body: { title: ' Dune ', author: ' Frank Herbert ' } }); console.log(JSON.stringify(created)); const invalid = handleCreateBook({ method: 'POST', body: { title: '', author: 'x' } }); console.log(JSON.stringify(invalid));"","description":"Verify api.cjs file and test handler behavior"}}],"terminal_reason":"completed","fast_mode_state":"off","uuid":"bd56cf33-1ec1-47dd-ab71-25461aa9ff39"}

const { normalizeBook } = require('./apps/catalog/model.cjs'); const b = normalizeBook({ title: ' Dune ', author: ' Frank Herbert ' }); if (b.title !== 'Dune' || b.author !== 'Frank Herbert') throw new Error(JSON.stringify(b)); try { normalizeBook({ title: '', author: 'x' }); throw new Error('expected TypeError'); } catch (error) { if (!(error instanceof TypeError)) throw error; } console.log('catalog model ok');
